overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a gold convertible driving through Night City at dusk. The vehicle travels from a shaded highway underpass through neon-lit commercial districts, transitioning from elevated highways to street-level boulevards lined with holographic advertisements and storefronts.

agents.ego_description: driving a gold convertible under a concrete overpass in moderate traffic flow

notable_agents.action: brown sedan traveling in the opposing lane parallel to ego vehicle

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass covering the roadway above
tall concrete wall lining the left side of the highway
brown vintage-style sedan driving in the left opposing lane
red vehicle brake lights visible ahead in the same lane

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass with limited natural light. The gold convertible drives along a multi-lane asphalt road with concrete sound barriers on the left and moderate traffic flowing in both directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban highway with commercial billboards

events.description: exits shaded overpass into bright golden hour sunset lighting
enters neon-lit commercial corridor with towering digital billboards on both sides

agents.ego_description: accelerating along elevated highway while approaching the sunset-lit city center

entered.detail: bright orange and pink sunset visible ahead between buildings
tall modern glass skyscraper reflecting the sunset light
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade
metal safety railing along the elevated highway edge
tall vertical digital displays with colorful cyberpunk advertising

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the overpass into brilliant sunset light, revealing an elevated highway flanked by glass towers and massive digital billboards. The lighting shifts dramatically from artificial shade to warm natural backlighting as the car accelerates toward the neon-lit commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway transitioning to street level intersection

events.description: makes a right turn at traffic intersection descending from elevated highway to street level

agents.ego_description: navigating through the neon-lit corridor and executing a right turn at the intersection

notable_agents.action: black car ahead slowing down for the intersection turn

entered.detail: floating 3D holographic display above the road showing product advertisements
crossroads with traffic signals and crosswalk markings
mid-rise buildings with illuminated storefronts at street level

segments.scene_description: Driving through a canyon of neon-lit skyscrapers with holographic advertisements overhead, the vehicle approaches a traffic intersection. At approximately 24 seconds, the car makes a right turn, descending from the elevated highway to street level while navigating around other traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial downtown street with storefronts and neon signage

events.description: passes through marked pedestrian crosswalk intersection

agents.ego_description: cruising through the commercial district passing pedestrians and illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the sidewalk past neon-lit shop windows

entered.detail: ground-level shops with illuminated signs and display windows
bright red and blue neon business signs attached to building facades
elevated walkway with pedestrians visible on the right side
tall palm trees lining the left side of the boulevard
pedestrian bridge crossing over the street connecting buildings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along a bustling commercial boulevard at street level, passing neon-lit storefronts and pedestrians on sidewalks. Palm trees line the left side while holographic billboards and overhead walkways dominate the urban canopy above the multi-lane road.

events.description: enters covered roadway under concrete overpass structure

agents.ego_description: driving under the overpass approaching the end of the sequence

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating a tunnel-like effect
utilitarian concrete structures with minimal lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions back into a covered roadway beneath a concrete overpass, leaving the neon-lit commercial district behind. The lighting shifts to artificial overhead lamps as the vehicle continues through the underpass with industrial buildings visible on the sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a gold convertible as it travels from a shaded industrial underpass through a vibrant, neon-lit urban center and back into a covered roadway. It begins beneath a massive concrete highway overpass in limited light, moving along a multi-lane road flanked by sound barriers. As the vehicle emerges from the shade, the scene shifts dramatically into brilliant sunset light on an elevated highway surrounded by glass towers and massive digital billboards. The camera then follows the car through a canyon of holographic advertisements before it makes a right turn, descending from the highway to a bustling street-level boulevard lined with neon storefronts and palm trees. Finally, the environment transitions away from the commercial district as the vehicle enters another concrete overpass, where the warm sunset fades into the glow of artificial overhead lamps.
